content.text: The Government of Nepal may constitute a Federal Commission for making suggestions on matters relating to the boundaries of States.
The names of the States under clause
of Article 56 shall be set by a two thirds majority of the total number of members of the concerned State Assemblies.

The Government of Nepal shall constitute a commission for the determination of the number and boundaries of Village Bodies, Municipalities and Special, Protected or Autonomous Regions to be formed under clauses

of Article 56. The commission must determine the number and boundaries of the Village Bodies, Municipalities and Special, Protected or Autonomous Regions in accordance with the criteria set by the Government of Nepal.
shall be constituted no later than six months of the date of commencement of this Constitution. Its term shall be one year.
